---
title: "Kaggle : Sleep staging"
description: "Deep learning for sleep stage scoring on EEG signals. Competition hosted in partnership with Dreem, a company developing sleep monitoring headbands. "
author:
  - name: Pablo Mas
    url: https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/dreem-3-sleep-staging-challenge-2021
    affiliation: MSc at BME Paris (Bioengineering and Innovation in Neuroscience track)
    affiliation-url: https://www.bme-paris.com/program/master-2/bioengineering-and-innovation-in-neurosciences-bin/
date: 11-17-2021
categories: [Python, University project, Kaggle, Deep learning] # self-defined categories
image: dreem-kaggle.png
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
---

<style>
  button {
    border: 1px solid black;
    border-radius: 5px;
    padding: 8px 15px;
    font-size: 20px;
  }
  button a {
    color: black;
    text-decoration: none;
    filter: invert(0%);
    transition: filter 1000000s;
    font-weight: bold;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    height: 100%;
  }
  button a img {
    margin-right: 8px;
  }
  button:hover {
    background-color: black;
    border-color: white;
  }
  button:hover a {
    color: white;
    filter: invert(100%);
  }
  button:hover a img {
    filter: invert(100%);
  }
</style>
<button>
  <a href="dreem-report.pdf" download>
    <img src="https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/482/482216.png" alt="PDF icon" width="30px">
    PDF
  </a>
</button>

<style>
  button {
    border: 1px solid black;
    border-radius: 5px;
    padding: 8px 15px;
    font-size: 20px;
  }
  button a {
    color: black;
    text-decoration: none;
    filter: invert(0%);
    transition: filter 1000000s;
    font-weight: bold;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    height: 100%;
  }
  button a img {
    margin-right: 8px;
  }
  button:hover {
    background-color: black;
    border-color: white;
  }
  button:hover a {
    color: white;
    filter: invert(100%);
  }
  button:hover a img {
    filter: invert(100%);
  }
</style>
<button>
  <a href="https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/dreem-3-sleep-staging-challenge-2021"  target="_blank">
    <img src="https://cdn.iconscout.com/icon/free/png-256/kaggle-3772770-3146903.png" alt="Kaggle" width="30px">
    Kaggle
  </a>
</button>
